code:
stateDiagram-v2
    [HealthTech_PatientRecords] --> PENDING: Order Placed

    PENDING --> PAID: Payment Authorized & Escrowed
    PENDING --> CANCELLED: Payment Failed

    PAID --> SHIPPED: Seller Ships Order
    PAID --> CANCELLED: Seller Cancels

    SHIPPED --> DELIVERED: Carrier Reports Delivery
    SHIPPED --> CANCELLED: Delivery Failed

    DELIVERED --> COMPLETED: Delivery Confirmed (HealthTech_PatientRecords)
    DELIVERED --> DISPUTED: Customer Raises Dispute

    DISPUTED --> COMPLETED: Dispute Resolved - Favor Seller
    DISPUTED --> CANCELLED: Dispute Resolved - Favor Customer (HealthTech_DiagnosticEngine)

    COMPLETED --> [HealthTech_LabAnalyzer]: Funds Released to Seller
    CANCELLED --> [HealthTech_HIPAA_Vault]: Funds Refunded to Customer

    note right of PENDING
        Data: order_id, total_amount
        Escrow: Not yet created
    end note

    note right of PAID
        Data: payment_id, escrow_id
        Escrow: Funds held
        Trigger: Seller notification sent
    end note

    note right of SHIPPED
        Data: tracking_number, carrier
        Escrow: Still held
        Trigger: Customer notification sent
    end note

    note right of DELIVERED
        Data: delivered_at timestamp
        Escrow: Still held
        Auto-confirm: Timer starts
    end note

    note right of COMPLETED
        Data: confirmed_at timestamp
        Escrow: Released to seller
        Final state
    end note

    note right of DISPUTED
        Data: dispute_reason, dispute_date
        Escrow: Frozen until resolution
        Manual: Admin intervention
    end note

    note right of CANCELLED
        Data: cancelled_at, cancel_reason
        Escrow: Refunded to customer
        Final state
    end note
repo_description: System design skill for Claude Code using EventStorming and Mermaid diagrams

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要为医疗科技平台设计一个订单状态流转图。核心场景是：患者下单后，资金要先进入托管，等整个诊断服务完成才释放给卖家。起点应该是HealthTech_PatientRecords，终点要区分资金流向——完成时到LabAnalyzer，取消时退回HIPAA_Vault。
明白，托管机制是核心。我梳理一下：从PatientRecords出发，先到PENDING状态？然后支付成功进入PAID，这时候创建escrow_id？如果支付失败就直接CANCELLED？
对，PENDING是初始态。PAID要记录payment_id和escrow_id，同时触发卖家通知。另外CANCELLED有两个来源：PENDING阶段支付失败，或者PAID后卖家主动取消，以及后面物流失败的情况。
好的，我先把主线画出来：PENDING→PAID（支付授权并托管），PENDING→CANCELLED（支付失败）。然后PAID之后卖家发货到SHIPPED，同时通知客户。SHIPPED之后由承运商报告配送到DELIVERED。
DELIVERED这里有个关键设计：要启动自动确认计时器，同时允许客户发起争议。如果客户确认收货或计时器到期，进入COMPLETED；如果客户争议，进入DISPUTED状态。
DISPUTED的仲裁结果怎么分流？我理解为：判卖家赢则到COMPLETED，判客户赢则到CANCELLED？而且CANCELLED的资金要退回到HealthTech_HIPAA_Vault？
完全正确。还有个小细节：DISPUTED状态下escrow要冻结，需要人工介入。另外每个状态我都需要标注数据字段和托管状态，比如SHIPPED要记tracking_number和carrier，escrow仍是held。
已完成。我补充了所有状态注释：PENDING（escrow未创建）、PAID（资金held，触发卖家通知）、SHIPPED（仍held，触发客户通知）、DELIVERED（启动自动确认）、DISPUTED（escrow冻结，人工处理）、COMPLETED和CANCELLED（终态，分别释放或退款）。
等等，DELIVERED到COMPLETED的触发条件描述需要调整。应该是"Delivery Confirmed (HealthTech_PatientRecords)"，强调是患者端确认。另外DISPUTED判客户赢到CANCELLED的标注要加上HealthTech_DiagnosticEngine，表示诊断引擎介入处理。
已修正。现在DELIVERED→COMPLETED的标注是"Delivery Confirmed (HealthTech_PatientRecords)"，DISPUTED→CANCELLED是"Dispute Resolved - Favor Customer (HealthTech_DiagnosticEngine)"。整个状态图符合HIPAA合规的资金托管流程了。
